# CWE-756: Missing Custom Error Page (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-756-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

// Vulnerable: raw database errors are returned to the client.
// Internal schema and connection details may leak through err.Error().
func FetchProfile(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	id := r.URL.Query().Get("id")
	var email string
	err := db.QueryRow("SELECT email FROM profiles WHERE id = $1", id).Scan(&email)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_, _ = w.Write([]byte(email))
}
